X.essay: Clean Effect/Drizzle/UI slice with entitlement API and generate/dashboard plan UX. Stack fit is strong and tests pass, but RFC C’s usage ledger reserve/commit/release is largely missing—quota appears as static limits (used:0), so Free exhaustion is not truly enforced. Partial MVP relative to the shared RFC.

Y.essay: Closer to RFC C: subscriptions + usage_ledger, Entitlement/Usage/Billing services, and generate-path reserve/commit with PlanLimitExceeded. Focused tests pass. Weaker on generate UI gating (dashboard more than /generate) and Pro limits as unlimited (-1) vs PRD fair-use caps; some churn in dev-auth handlers.

hardEvidence.tests: X entitlement+billing focused PASS; Y billing-services+generate-monetization PASS (6)
